evals.expected_output: An array of templates with name, category, and metadata.
assertions: Response includes at least one template with name and category

evals.prompt: Get layout details for a specific template.
evals.expected_output: An object with theme colors, fonts, layouts (with indices), and master elements.
assertions: container_template_info is called with the chosen template_name
Response exposes layout indices used by python-pptx
Theme colors and fonts are returned

evals.prompt: Generate a signed download URL for a built deck.
evals.expected_output: A signed URL the user can fetch the deck from.
assertions: container_file_download_url is called with the absolute path to the .pptx
The URL is returned to the user with a clear note about TTL
